Raw Supple Hide  
 


This item can be used in tradeskills.
Recommended level of 29. Required level of 25.
WT: 0.5 Size: SMALL
Class: NEC WIZ MAG ENC
Race: ALL
Raw Supple Hide

This item can be used in tradeskills.
Recommended level of 29. Required level of 25.
WT: 0.5 Size: SMALL
Class: NEC WIZ MAG ENC
Race: ALL

Item Lore:Raw Supple Hide good for spell research
Item Type:Combinable
Stackable:1000
Merchant Value:0 pp 0 gp 1 sp 0 cp
Lucy Entry By:Suresap
Item Updated By:Gidono
Source:Live
IC Last Updated:2022-01-19 02:36:25
Page Updated:Thu Aug 12th, 2021

Expansion: Original
Average Price: No Data Pricing Data...
Rarity: Common
Level to Attain: 1

a glyphed custodian

a wightish ancille

Jahsohn Ak`sot

a coerced Erudite
a coerced gnome

a kly acolyte
a kly evoker

a festering hag

froglok nok shaman
froglok tsu shaman

I found the best drop off of the witchlamps..
▲ Page top
Sporalis!
QuoteReply
# Sep 01 2009 at 4:44 PM Rating: Good
__DEL__1593972017881
View User Forum
Sage
1,524 posts
Perhaps I was just lucky, but I got 2 to drop from sporalis in about 10 min. The repop VERY quickly too, so I'd highly recommend camping them for your supple hide.
▲ Page top
shadow man
QuoteReply
# Mar 07 2009 at 9:17 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592339711768
6 posts
Dropped off a shadow man, Lesser Faydark
▲ Page top
froglok nok shamans in FV
QuoteReply
# Nov 12 2008 at 12:16 PM Rating: Decent
BidenThyme
Scholar
137 posts
If you have a tracker, finding these little devils and blowing them apart is rather quick and easy...AND profitable.

I'd say they drop about one out of every four or five..and my tracking is consistently popping up more nok shamans, so it's just a matter of a bit of time. The little froggies love to attack, so I invis and track the nok shamans to kill.

Biden Thyme is way over their level, but I'm thinking that around 30ish, you could gather a lot of experience in this area as well as loots.

Good luck!!
▲ Page top
Dropped in ToFS
QuoteReply
# Sep 04 2008 at 7:50 PM Rating: Decent
LadyStarstruck
Sage
151 posts
Also dropped off a ghostly scholar in ToFS
▲ Page top
Highpass Keep
QuoteReply
# Aug 15 2008 at 3:14 PM Rating: Decent
scuba
Scholar
110 posts
After raising 2 research alts, I have found a great place to farm the hides, they drop only from caster types, and the most dependable place I have found for them is HPK. I am able to get about 8-10 an hour there. To heck with the totally abysmal drop rates other places.
▲ Page top
Highpass Keep
QuoteReply
# Aug 22 2008 at 1:09 PM Rating: Decent
drool
1,563 posts
HPK = High Pass Keep?
▲ Page top
Highpass Keep
QuoteReply
# Aug 22 2008 at 1:28 PM Rating: Decent
drool
1,563 posts
Nevermind obviously I didn't read the subject of your post ;p Thanks!

Spent about 2 hours in HPK killing the goblins, not a single hide drop. Logged back in a little while ago, and got 2 in like 10 minutes. Only off the casters as the OP said. Unfortunately getting a lot of rounds with very few casters, but at least I got a couple.

Edited, Aug 25th 2008 4:10pm by drool
▲ Page top
Highpass Keep
QuoteReply
# Mar 22 2011 at 8:11 AM Rating: Decent
jepster4515
20 posts
These things no longer seem to drop in HPK... the gnolls now seem to drop raw rough hides.
▲ Page top
Raw Suptle Hides
QuoteReply
# Aug 03 2008 at 10:22 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592313433992
11 posts
I've been in Blightfire killing hedge devils, sporalis etc and have killed 75 and got 3 hides. Some loot okay but nothing worth staying there for a long time. Keep Blightfire metal and shambling vines. They get you a good plat for each but if you don't need to get the hides dont. Sporalis spawn in 2-3 minutes so stay out of area or you get trained by 2-3.

Herachilles 66 Warrior
Council of Arcana

6 posts
drops are reg off accursed lookout ))
▲ Page top
Supple hides
QuoteReply
# May 18 2008 at 1:14 PM Rating: Decent
scuba
Scholar
110 posts
The drop rate vs kills here really sucks, in 3 hours got 5 hides. Killed Dragoneater 18 times to get one hide. While the drop rate is really bad, I have yet to get a supple hide from any other mob in the zone.

I farmed the hides with my level 24 mage and by the time I got the 5 hides, I was 7 levels behind in my spells.
▲ Page top
Supple hides
QuoteReply
# May 18 2008 at 1:28 PM Rating: Decent
scuba
Scholar
110 posts
One additional thing, I logged onto my level 69 to farm the hides and not get further behind on the spells, ran there cleared the place and went afk for 2 mins, when I got back, I was being mass mobbed. The casters were all casting and once cleared again, I got 5 hides in 10 mins.

Now, this might just be random, then again, it might not be. You will have to see what works for you.
▲ Page top
Supple hides
QuoteReply
# May 18 2008 at 1:44 PM Rating: Decent
scuba
Scholar
110 posts
Darn, thought I was maybe onto something, but I guess not, for the next ninty mins, not one hide dropped.

Anyway, have fun and boo to Blizz for the dismal drop rate.

# Oct 09 2006 at 1:33 AM Rating: Decent
boadil
2 posts
I just killed about 100 Hedge Devil's and got no raw supple hide's. Can someone confirm that they drop off of them?

Edited, Oct 9th 2006 at 2:38am PDT by boadil
▲ Page top
raw supple hides
QuoteReply
# Oct 26 2006 at 9:53 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1593361146586
View User Forum
111 posts
Actually these, raw hides, Blightfire infused silk/hide/links/plate will drop off of just about anything and everything out in the Moors. Ya just gotta keep whackin' away. I haven't found anything that will always drop any of these. Named will just about always drop a Blightfire pattern, but the rest is problematic.


Ammanita on Drinal
